peer.notes: Grounded in `pi --help` on 2026-06-19. Pi accepts @files in message arguments; provider evals disable discovered extensions, skills, and context files, then use text output so the strict Cerberus marker parser sees raw assistant content.

unsupported: daemonized children outside the process group
paid provider calls without an explicit eval budget
profiles.notes: Pi is the minimal prompt-discipline baseline.

peer.notes: Grounded in `goose run --help` on 2026-06-19. Goose supports --instructions <FILE>; the runner writes that file privately.

unsupported: daemonized children outside the process group
paid provider calls without an explicit eval budget
profiles.notes: Goose exercises a richer local-agent surface with MCP and extension behavior.

args_template: Follow the attached Cerberus reviewer prompt exactly.
peer.notes: Grounded in `opencode run --help` on 2026-06-19. OpenCode supports --file attachments; `--` terminates the --file array before the static reviewer message, and default output keeps the assistant response inspectable as raw marked text instead of JSON events.

unsupported: daemonized children outside the process group
paid provider calls without an explicit eval budget

peer.notes: Grounded in `omp --help` on 2026-06-19. OMP accepts @files in message arguments; provider evals disable discovered extensions, skills, and rules, then use text output so JSON event streams cannot duplicate artifact markers.

unsupported: daemonized children outside the process group
paid provider calls without an explicit eval budget
profiles.notes: OMP is the heavy Pi-derived harness candidate.
